description_long: This object is a sleek, modern wireless router with a matte black finish and angular, geometric design reminiscent of a stealth aircraft. It features four tall, vertical external antennas positioned symmetrically at the rear, enhancing its signal range and giving it a high-tech appearance. The top surface is sharply contoured, with subtle branding embossed on one side. The rear panel is equipped with multiple ports, including four blue Ethernet LAN ports, a yellow WAN port, a USB port, and a power input, all clearly visible and neatly aligned. Ventilation grilles with a blue and purple accent pattern are present on the underside, suggesting efficient cooling. Small indicator lights are subtly integrated on the top left, providing status information without disrupting the minimalist aesthetic.
description: A matte black, angular wireless router with four tall antennas, multiple rear ports, and subtle indicator lights, featuring a modern, high-tech design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the four vertical antennas, angular top surface, and subtle indicator lights on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sharp, geometric contours and the embossed brand logo on the right panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full array of ports: four Ethernet LAN, one WAN, one USB, and a power input, as well as the base ventilation grilles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the angular design and the absence of visible ports or lights on this side.
attribute_port_arrangement: 4 Ethernet LAN ports in a row, 1 WAN port on the right, 1 USB port on the left, 1 power input on the far right
